name: Lattice Verb
explanation: A classic algorithmic reverb built from the textbook Schroeder/Moorer topology: four parallel feedback comb filters with prime delay lengths are summed, each with a one-pole high-frequency damper in its feedback path, then passed through two series allpass diffusers that smear the echoes into a smooth, controllable tail. Controls: Mix, Size (scales the comb delay lengths), Decay (comb feedback / RT60), Damping (HF loss per pass) and Pre-Delay.
